mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item(cart_id, item_id, count) VALUES (#{cartId}, #{itemId}, #{count})
mapper.select: SELECT ci.cart_item_id , i.item_name , i.price , ci.count , im.img_url FROM cart_item ci JOIN item i ON ci.item_id = i.item_id JOIN item_img im ON i.item_id = im.item_id WHERE ci.cart_id = #{cartId} AND im.rep_img_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY ci.reg_time DESC
